title: Supreme Court upholds relief to MLA Rahul Mamkootathil in rape case, removes HC remarks against victim
description: The Supreme Court on Wednesday upheld the anticipatory bail granted by Kerala High Court to Member of Legislative Assembly (MLA) and former Congress leader Rahul Mamkootathil in one of the three rapes cases lodged against him.A Bench of Justices MM Sundresh and N Kotiswar Singh dismissed the appeal filed by the complainant challenging the High Court verdict.However, the Court deleted certain observations made by the High Court in its order against the complainant-victim."Though we are not inclin
